title: Can Large Language Models Revolutionize Survey Research? Experiments with Disaster Preparedness Responses
summary:
arXiv:2605.19229v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Survey research faces mounting structural challenges: declining response rates, sample bias, block-wise missingness among at-risk respondents, and AI-assisted fraudulent completions in online panels. Large language models (LLMs) have been proposed as a remedy, yet rigorous evaluations across the full survey workflow remain scarce, particularly in disaster contexts where data quality matters most.
